---
title: "About"
toc: false
---

::: {.page-hero}
## About Me

I am Chuqiao Song, also using the name Sebastian Song. I am a master's student interested in **computational modelling of language, behaviour, and brain data**, with current work spanning behavioural benchmarking, multilingual semantic representation, and neural modelling.
:::

::: {.grid-two}
::: {.panel-card}
### Research Orientation

My work sits at the intersection of **language, cognition, and neuroimaging**. I am especially interested in using computational models to ask cognitively meaningful questions: whether models capture participant-level behavioural variation, how internal representations are structured across languages, and how model dynamics relate to brain responses.
:::

::: {.panel-card}
### Methodological Focus

- Behavioural modelling and response-time analysis
- Representational similarity analysis
- RNN and LLM modelling
- Model comparison and human-model alignment
- Reproducible workflows in Python and R
:::
:::

## Current Research Directions

::: {.feature-grid}
::: {.feature-card}
### Benchmarking

Developing evaluation pipelines that test whether computational models explain human behavioural data beyond task-level accuracy.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### LLM RSA

Using multilingual language models as computational models of semantic representation and testing their alignment with cross-linguistic structure.
:::

::: {.feature-card}
### RNN Modelling

Building recurrent models for auditory sequence perception, trial-level RT prediction, and neural alignment with fMRI data.
:::
:::

## Academic Interests

::: {.interest-list}
- Computational modelling of language and cognition
- Human-AI alignment in behaviour and neural representation
- Multilingual semantic structure
- Behavioural and fMRI model fitting
- Sequence processing and predictive coding
:::

## Links

::: {.tool-grid}
::: {.tool-card}
### Email

[songchuqiao23@gmail.com](mailto:songchuqiao23@gmail.com)
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### Scholar

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WkLFQc0AAAAJ&hl=en)
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### ORCID

[0009-0003-3289-8548](https://orcid.org/0009-0003-3289-8548)
:::

::: {.tool-card}
### CV

[Download CV](CV_Chuqiao_SONG_Final.pdf)
:::
:::
